news.title: Securitize to debut on NYSE this Thursday after gaining final nod for merger
news.summary: Securitize announced that shareholders of Cantor have greenlit the business combination, which is expected to close on Wednesday.

news.title: Ark Invest loads up on Coinbase, Circle, Bullish, Robinhood shares as stocks rally higher
news.summary: Ark bought $6.85 million worth of Coinbase, $6.21 million worth of Circle Internet Group, and $3.54 million in Bullish on Monday.

news.title: Singapore's Hyperliquid warning, Indonesia's FinFluencer licence: Asia Express
news.summary: Hyperliquid follows Bybit onto Singapore's "naughty" list, Indonesia's new scheme to certify social media influencers promoting crypto: Asia Express.
